meaning: vt.贮藏,贮备,存储n.商店,店铺,贮藏,贮备
examples: They run a small grocery store.
You pay less for the store brand.
Surprises were also in store for me.
During a trip to Atlanta, I needed a drug store at Hartsfield-Jackson International Airport.
While the tactic works for discounters like Wal-Mart, it has not motivated department-store shoppers.
